dataset.description: Configurable parameters to construct the dataset for the NVPanoptix3D experiment.

gen_aug_weight.description: Weight for generated augmentation, 0.0 will disable generated augmentation.
gen_aug_weight.title: weight for generated augmentation

single_category_max_area.description: Maximum ratio of crop area that can be occupied by a single semantic category.
single_category_max_area.title: maximum ratio of crop area

test_max_size.description: The maximum resize size for test.
test_max_size.title: test max size

test_min_size.description: The minimum resize size for test data.
test_min_size.title: test min size

train_crop_size.description: The random crop size for training data in [H, W].
train_crop_size.title: train crop size

train_max_size.description: The maximum random crop size for training data.
train_max_size.title: train max size

train_min_size.description: A list of sizes to perform random resize.
train_min_size.title: train min size

contiguous_id.description: Flag to enable contiguous ids for labels.
contiguous_id.title: contiguous id

iso_value.description: ISO value to reconstruct mesh from TUDF volume.
iso_value.title: ISO value

label_map.description: A path to label map file.
label_map.title: label map path

min_instance_pixels.description: Minimum number of pixels required for an instance to be considered valid.
min_instance_pixels.title: minimum number of pixels

occ_truncation_lvl.description: Value to create occuppancy volume from TUDF volume.
occ_truncation_lvl.title: occ truncation level

pin_memory.description: Flag to allocate pagelocked memory for faster of data between the CPU and GPU.
pin_memory.title: pin memory

reduced_target_size.description: Image size to process at 3D stage.
reduced_target_size.title: image size to process at 3D stage

test.description: Configurable parameters to construct the test dataset.

json_path.description: JSON file in JSON format for image/mask pair.
json_path.title: annotation file path

num_workers.description: Number of workers in the dataloader.
num_workers.title: num workers

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the train dataset.

json_path.description: JSON file in JSON format for image/mask pair.
json_path.title: annotation file path

num_workers.description: Number of workers in the dataloader.
num_workers.title: num workers

val.description: Configurable parameters to construct the validation dataset.

json_path.description: JSON file in JSON format for image/mask pair.
json_path.title: annotation file path

num_workers.description: Number of workers in the dataloader.
num_workers.title: num workers

workers.description: The number of parallel workers processing data
workers.title: num workers

inference.description: Configurable parameters to construct the inferencer for the NVPanoptix3D experiment.

batch_size.description: The batch size of the input Tensor. This is important if batch_size > 1 for large dataset.
batch_size.title: batch size

checkpoint.description: Path to the checkpoint used for evaluation.
checkpoint.title: Checkpoint path

gpu_ids.description: List of GPU IDs to run the evaluation on. The length must equal evaluate.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the evaluation job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the inference on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

trt_engine.description: Path to the TensorRT engine folder to be used for inference.
trt_engine.title: TensorRT Engine folder

model.description: Configurable parameters to construct the model for the NVPanoptix3D experiment.

backbone.description: Configuration hyper parameters for the NVPanoptix3D Backbone.

backbone_type.description: Type of backbone to use. Available backbone: vggt.
backbone_type.title: backbone name

pretrained_model_path.description: Path to a pretrained backbone file.
pretrained_model_path.title: pretrained backbone path

backbone.title: backbone

frustum3d.description: Configuration hyper parameters for the Frustum3D model.

completion_weights.description: The weights of the completion loss.
completion_weights.title: completion weights

panoptic_weight.description: The weight of the panoptic loss.
panoptic_weight.title: panoptic weight

surface_weight.description: The weight of the surface loss.
surface_weight.title: surface weight

unet_features.description: The number of features of the UNet.
unet_features.title: unet features

unet_output_channels.description: The number of output channels of the UNet.
unet_output_channels.title: unet output channels

frustum3d.title: frustum3d

mask_former.description: Configuration hyper parameters for the Mask2Former model.

class_weight.description: The relative weight of the classification error in the matching cost.
class_weight.title: Class loss coefficient

dec_layers.description: Numer of decoder layers in the transformer
dec_layers.title: decoder layers

depth_weight.description: The relative weight of the depth loss in the matching cost.
depth_weight.title: depth loss coefficient

dice_weight.description: The relative weight of the focal loss of the binary mask in the matching cost.
dice_weight.title: focal loss coefficient

importance_sample_ratio.description: Ratio of points that are sampled via important sampling.
importance_sample_ratio.title: importance sampling ratio

mask_weight.description: The relative weight of the dice loss of the binary mask in the matching cost
mask_weight.title: mask loss coefficient

mp_occ_weight.description: The relative weight of the mp occ loss in the matching cost.
mp_occ_weight.title: mp occ loss coefficient

no_object_weight.description: The relative classification weight applied to the no-object category.
no_object_weight.title: no object coefficient

pre_norm.description: Flag to add layer norm in the encoder or not.
pre_norm.title: Pre norm

train_num_points.description: The number of points P to sample.
train_num_points.title: number of points

transformer_dim_feedforward.description: Dimension of the feedforward network in the transformer
transformer_dim_feedforward.title: transformer dim feedforward

mask_former.title: mask2former

object_mask_threshold.description: The value of the threshold to be used when filtering out the object mask.
object_mask_threshold.title: object mask threshold

overlap_threshold.description: The value of the threshold to be used when evaluating overlap.
overlap_threshold.title: overlap threshold

projection.description: Configuration hyper parameters for the Projection model.

depth_feature_dim.description: The dimension of the depth feature.
depth_feature_dim.title: depth feature dim

projection.title: projection

sem_seg_head.description: Configuration hyper parameters for the Mask2Former Semantic Segmentation Head.

deformable_transformer_encoder_in_featur.description: List of feature names for deformable transformer encoder input.
deformable_transformer_encoder_in_featur.title: transformer encoder in_features

sem_seg_head.title: segmentation head configs

test_topk_per_image.description: Keep topk instances per image for instance segmentation.
test_topk_per_image.title: top k per image

model_name.description: Name of model if invoking task via :code:`model_agnostic`
model_name.title: Model name

results_dir.description: Path to where all the assets generated from a task are stored.
results_dir.title: Results directory

train.description: Configurable parameters to construct the trainer for the NVPanoptix3D experiment.

activation_checkpoint.description:
A True value instructs train to recompute in backward pass to save GPU memory,
        rather than storing activations.
activation_checkpoint.title: enable activation checkpointing

checkpoint_2d.description: Path to 2D stage checkpoint to initialize the 3D stage training.
checkpoint_2d.title: 2D stage checkpoint path

checkpoint_3d.description: Path to 3D stage checkpoint to initialize the 3D stage training.
checkpoint_3d.title: 3D stage checkpoint path

checkpoint_interval.description: The interval (in epochs) at which a checkpoint will be saved. Helps resume training.
checkpoint_interval.title: Checkpoint interval

checkpoint_interval_unit.description: The unit of the checkpoint interval.
checkpoint_interval_unit.title: Checkpoint interval unit

clip_grad_norm.description: Amount to clip the gradient by L2 Norm.
clip_grad_norm.title: clip gradient norm

distributed_strategy.description:
The multi-GPU training strategy.
        DDP (Distributed Data Parallel) and Fully Sharded DDP are supported.
distributed_strategy.title: distributed_strategy

freeze.description:
List of layer names to freeze.
        Example: ["backbone", "transformer.encoder", "input_proj"].
freeze.title: freeze

gpu_ids.description:
List of GPU IDs to run the training on. The length of this list
        must be equal to the number of gpus in train.num_gpus.
gpu_ids.title: GPU IDs

is_dry_run.description: Whether to run the trainer in Dry Run mode.
is_dry_run.title: Is dry run

num_epochs.description: Number of epochs to run the training.
num_epochs.title: Number of epochs

num_gpus.description: The number of GPUs to run the train job.
num_gpus.title: Number of GPUs

num_nodes.description: Number of nodes to run the training on. If > 1, then multi-node is enabled.
num_nodes.title: Number of nodes

optim.description: Hyper parameters to configure the optimizer.

backbone_multiplier.description: A multiplier for backbone learning rate.
backbone_multiplier.title: backbone learning rate multiplier

gamma.description: Multiplicative factor of learning rate decay.
gamma.title: gamma

lr.description: The initial learning rate for training the model.
lr.title: learning rate

lr_scheduler.description:
The learning scheduler:
                    * MultiStep : Decrease the lr by lr_decay from lr_steps
                    * Warmuppoly : Poly learning rate schedule.
lr_scheduler.title: learning rate scheduler

max_steps.description: The maximum number of steps to train the model.
max_steps.title: max steps

momentum.description: The momentum for the AdamW optimizer.
momentum.title: momentum - AdamW

monitor_name.description: The metric value to be monitored for the :code:`AutoReduce` Scheduler.
monitor_name.title: monitor_name

type.description: Type of optimizer used to train the network.

warmup_factor.description: The warmup factor for the learning rate scheduler.
warmup_factor.title: warmup factor

optim.title: optimizer

precision.description: Precision to run the training on.
precision.title: precision

results_dir.description: The folder to save the experiment.
results_dir.title: results directory

resume_training_checkpoint_path.description: Path to the checkpoint to resume training from.
resume_training_checkpoint_path.title: Resume checkpoint path

seed.description: The seed for the initializer in PyTorch. If < 0, disable fixed seed.
seed.title: Seed for randomization

val_check_interval.description: The number of iterations between validation checks.
val_check_interval.title: val check interval

validation_interval.description:
The interval (in epochs) at which a evaluation
        will be triggered on the validation dataset.
validation_interval.title: Validation interval

verbose.description: Flag to enable printing of detailed learning rate scaling from the optimizer.
verbose.title: enable verbose logs
